code:
---
config:
  layout:
  look: classic
  heme: redux-dark
---
stateDiagram
            [Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> PullRequestsList
            state PullRequestsList {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> PRL
                PRL --> PRLFiltered: apply filters and/or sorts
                PRLFiltered --> PRL: disable filters and sorts
                PRL --> PRL: move to page
                PRLFiltered --> PRLFiltered: move to page
            }
            PullRequestsList --> PREdit: Create PullRequests
            PREdit --> [Groupware_WikiPage]: Confirm creation 
            PREdit --> PullRequestsList: cancelss
            PullRequestsList --> PRView: view PullRequest
            PRView --> PullRequestsList: back
            PRView --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]: author approves
            PRView --> PREdit: author edits PullRequest
            PREdit --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]: author confirm edit
            state PREdit{Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> PREditor
              PREditor --> PRPreview: preview rendered page
              PRPreview --> PREditor: back to editor tab
            }
            state PRView {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> PRPost
              PRPost --> PRChanges : view changes
              PRChanges --> PRPost : view commit post & comments
            }

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个Pull Request的工作流状态图。核心是从Sprint Backlog进入，然后有一个PullRequestsList作为中心枢纽。
明白，Sprint Backlog作为入口。那PullRequestsList内部需要展开吗？比如有没有筛选或者分页的逻辑？
要的，List里面要有PRL状态，用户可以apply filters得到PRLFiltered，也可以disable filters回到PRL。两个状态都支持move to page分页。
好，我把PullRequestsList做成复合状态，内部包含PRL和PRLFiltered的循环转换。接下来从List能做什么操作？
从List可以Create PullRequests进入PREdit，也可以view PullRequest进入PRView。PREdit和PRView都要做成复合状态，内部有编辑器或帖子详情。
PREdit内部我设计成Groupware_KanbanBoard指向PREditor，然后PREditor可以preview rendered page到PRPreview，也能back to editor tab。这样对吗？
对的。另外PREdit确认创建后要回到WikiPage，取消则回到PullRequestsList。作者编辑完成后要confirm edit到ChatRoom。
PRView这边我这样设计：内部是ChatRoom指向PRPost，PRPost可以view changes到PRChanges，也能view commit post & comments返回。PRView整体可以back到List，或者author approves回到Sprint Backlog，或者author edits PullRequest回到PREdit。
完全正确，所有流转都覆盖了。最后注意theme用redux-dark，look用classic。
